name: Candy Kingdom
startIntroPart1: Welcome to the Candy Kingdom, where life is sweet and science rules!
startIntroPart2: Our gumdrop trees and sugar-coated laboratories are the envy of Ooo.
declaringWar: For the safety of my citizens, I must dissolve your threat.
attacked: You dare bring war to my sugary shores? You'll regret this.
defeated: The experiment... has failed. But science will rise again.
introduction: Greetings, traveller. I am Princess Bubblegum, ruler of the Candy Kingdom. Care for a taffy?
tradeRequest: Let's make a deal. I've got some excellent sugar reserves.
denounced: Your rule is as unstable as a poorly mixed carbonated solution.
declaringfriendship: We share common interests. Let's combine our research!

name: Ice Kingdom
startIntroPart1: Hey princess! Wanna marry me? No? Okay, let's just rule the frozen north then.
startIntroPart2: The Ice Kingdom is cold, lonely, and full of penguins... Gunter!
declaringWar: I'm kidnapping you! Er, I mean... declare war!
attacked: What the junk?! Nobody attacks Ice King!
defeated: Nooooo! My princesses... my kingdom... Gunter, where are you?
introduction: Hi! I'm Ice King! Do you like my crown? It gives me power over ice and also sometimes makes me crazy, haha!
hateHello: You're not a princess... go away.
tradeRequest: I've got some ice sculptures to trade. Very valuable.
declaringfriendship: You can be my friend! Just don't touch my penguins.
uniques: Units fight at full strength when attacking [in Snow]

name: Fire Kingdom
startIntroPart1: Everything burns. That's just how it is. But I'm trying to be a good ruler.
startIntroPart2: The Fire Kingdom is a land of magma, scorched earth, and fierce warriors.
declaringWar: You've pissed me off. Now you burn.
attacked: You think you can extinguish me? Try harder!
defeated: Too much... water... I'm sorry, my people...
introduction: I'm Flame Princess. Stay cool, or don't. I don't really care.
tradeRequest: Take this obsidian. It's sharp and hot. Perfect for gifts.
denounced: You're weak. I can't stand weakness.
declaringfriendship: Alright, you're not as terrible as the others. Let's be allies.
uniques: [-1 Happiness] from every [Forest] tile <in this city>

name: Lumpy Space
startIntroPart1: Oh my glob, you guys, it's Lumpy Space!
startIntroPart2: We don't have, like, rules. Just lumps. And drama.
declaringWar: You're totally not my style. Prepare for a lumping!
attacked: Ugh, violence? So un-lumpy. But fine!
defeated: Whatever, I'm gonna go sulk in the Lumpy Space dimension.
introduction: Hiiiii! I'm LSP. You're probably, like, totally jealous of my lumpy awesomeness.
hateHello: Ew, you look lumpy. And not in the good way.
tradeRequest: I'll give you some of my excess lumps for, like, whatever.
denounced: You are such a lump-free weirdo!
declaringfriendship: We're besties now! Let's do brunch.
uniques: [-1 Gold] per [City] <starting from the second city>

name: Wildberry Kingdom
startIntroPart1: From the tangled jungles of Ooo, the sweetest berries grow.
startIntroPart2: We may be small, but our berries pack a punch – and a vote.
declaringWar: For the grove! Roll out the berry brigade!
attacked: You dare stomp on our vines? Prepare for a thorny reception!
defeated: The jam is spoiled... but seeds will scatter.
introduction: Welcome, friend! Can I offer you a fresh raspberry?
tradeRequest: I have the finest wildberries. A trade would sweeten both our lives.
denounced: Your politics are as flavorless as an unripe blueberry.
declaringfriendship: Let us grow together, like intertwining vines!

name: Slime Kingdom
startIntroPart1: Squish, squish. Welcome to the Slime Kingdom.
startIntroPart2: We're oozy, drippy, and surprisingly good at art and hugs.
declaringWar: You are not fun. Prepare to be slimed!
attacked: Ew, pointy things! But we stick together!
defeated: Oh glob, we're drying out... nooo...
introduction: Hi. Want a slime hug? It's very moist.
hateHello: You look dry. I don't like dry.
tradeRequest: I have some extra goo. Very useful for lubricating... things.
denounced: You are solid and stubborn. Have you ever considered being more flexible?
declaringfriendship: Let's be slime buddies! We'll ooze together!
uniques: [All] units heal [5] HP per turn, even after attacking

name: Breakfast Kingdom
startIntroPart1: Rise and shine! Breakfast Kingdom is the most important kingdom of the day!
startIntroPart2: We serve up pancakes, bacon, and a generous helping of diplomacy.
attacked: Don't egg us on! We'll scramble your forces!
defeated: We're... burnt out. But breakfast will be served again tomorrow.
introduction: Good morning! Would you like some coffee and a scone?
hateHello: Oh, it's you. My pancakes have lost their fluffiness.
tradeRequest: I've got a surplus of bacon. Interested?
denounced: Your kingdom is like a burnt omelette – unpleasant and hard to swallow.
declaringfriendship: You're invited to brunch! Friends forever!
uniques: [-15% Growth] in all cities <when not at war>

name: Goblin Kingdom
startIntroPart2: We dig, we scrap, we swarm. Don't underestimate a goblin horde.
declaringWar: Get 'em, boys! Shiny things for everyone!
attacked: You come to our tunnels? Fool! We'll bury you!
defeated: Our tunnels collapse... no more shinies...
introduction: Hey you. Got any sparkly things? No? Then what're you good for?
hateHello: You smell like a dwarf. I don't like dwarves.
tradeRequest: Trade us metal for shiny things, yes?
denounced: You're not even worth a rusty nail!
declaringfriendship: You're okay. We'll share our scrap pile with you.

name: City of Thieves
startIntroPart1: Welcome to the City of Thieves. Watch your pockets.
startIntroPart2: We have no laws, only 'unwritten agreements'. Our economy runs on nimble fingers.
declaringWar: We're taking what's ours. And what's yours. Mostly yours.
attacked: Heh, you think you can catch us?
defeated: Alright, you got us. The loot's all yours... this time.
introduction: Hey pal, wanna buy a watch? It's totally not stolen.
hateHello: Keep your distance, this one's got 'guards' written all over them.
tradeRequest: I've got some 'discounted' goods. No questions asked.
denounced: You're way too honest. It's disgusting.
declaringfriendship: You're a trustworthy scoundrel. Let's split some loot.

name: Castle Lemongrab
startIntroPart2: The Castle of Lemongrab is a land of rigid order, sour tempers, and loud screams.
declaringWar: YOU are UNACCEPTABLE! Prepare for judgement!
attacked: HOW DARE YOU! This is MY castle!
introduction: I am the Earl of Lemongrab! You must follow the rules or face the consequences!
tradeRequest: I will trade you this lemon, but you must not peel it!
denounced: YOU ARE A BLIGHT ON THIS LAND!
declaringfriendship: You are... acceptable. For now. Don't make me regret this.
uniques: [+20% Strength] for [All] units <when adjacent to an enemy [Capital]>
